rule-three-quotes-required.description: Purchases above threshold require at least 3 supplier quotations

rule-po-approval-by-value.description: PO above configured value requires approval before sending to supplier

rule-gr-cannot-exceed-po-qty.description: Received quantity per line cannot exceed ordered quantity

rule-invoice-match-tolerance.description: Invoice amount must match PO within configured tolerance

rule-blocked-supplier-no-po.description: Purchase orders cannot be created for blocked suppliers

rule-po-requires-approved-requisition.description: When requisition flow is active, PO must reference an approved requisition
